title: Cosmos live-test fixed accounts config
description: Single-secret JSON describing the fixed Cosmos DB accounts used by the Java live tests. Stored as one Key Vault secret / ADO variable (cosmos-live-test-accounts) and refreshed by the account-creation script on each ephemeral-tenant rotation. Each pipeline stage selects one account by its logical name.

version.description: Schema version. The parser rejects versions it does not understand.

accounts.description: Map of logical account selector -> account descriptor.

key.description: Primary master key. Treated as a secret by the parser.

secondaryKey.description: Optional secondary master key (exported as SECONDARY_ACCOUNT_KEY).

regions.description: Regions the account is provisioned in (informational / documentation).

preferredLocations.description: Optional preferred locations exported as PREFERRED_LOCATIONS.

consistency.description: Account default consistency level (exported as ACCOUNT_CONSISTENCY).

multiWrite.description: True if the account has multiple write locations (multi-master).

thinClient.description: True if the account is thin-client enabled.
